response: "{\"session_id\":\"Jh4dxam7S7e4hhH2\",\"results\":[{\"source_id\":\"6q3u15_pM2o469Pj8Yfrz\",\"url\":\"https://www.facebook.com/SlashGear/posts/kia-has-announced-a-national-recall-for-the-kia-k5-and-if-you-own-one-its-someth/1642427287443670/\",\"title\":\"Kia has announced a national recall for the Kia K5, and if you own ...\",\"publish_date\":\"2026-03-24\",\"excerpts\":[\"AUTO RECALL Kia has recalled more than 250,000 K5 sedans (2021-2024 models with 1.6L T-GDI engine) due to a defect that could cause the fuel tank to melt and leak, increasing the risk of fire.\"]},{\"source_id\":\"E2lmMaSMebvFIWxZkH-_8\",\"url\":\"https://www.nhtsa.gov/vehicle/2025/KIA/K5/4%20DR/AWD\",\"title\":\"Vehicle Detail Search - 2025 KIA K5 4 DR AWD - NHTSA\",\"publish_date\":null,\"excerpts\":[\"# NHTSA Information\\n* About NHTSA\\n* Careers & Internships\\n* Contact Us\\n* Recall Information\\n* Report a Safety Problem\"]},{\"source_id\":\"4c4w9i3CjnF1ALnxygIiT\",\"url\":\"https://www.iihs.org/ratings/veh...[truncated 25088 chars]...le luck with my 2024 Kia k5 GT that I got less than 6 months ago. Constant re-occurring Engine Code (P065312) that's happened from 1000-current (12,665) mileage. HUGE safety concern in my opinion. Also the exterior trim is falling off in certain places and is being replaced under warranty. I've had a few issues with the radio/back-up camera freezing up and becoming … unresponsive as well.\\nThe primary issue is the Engine. When the Code occurs the car gets stuck at a certain rev point w/ no control from the accelerator, you have to pull over and restart the vehicle to resolve issue. Not the worst thing don't get me wrong, but if it happened on the highway? that's an accident waiting to happen.\\nI've had no luck with any of the dealerships I've been to, and my Kia Consumer Affair rep keeps advising me to give another dealership a chance. I've given the dealership/affair rep ample information to be prepared for the issue, but no luck so far.\\nRead more\\nRead less\\nReport abuse\"]}]}"

## The rally legend for the next generation.

Get thrilling four-door sports sedan performance on all kinds of surfaces from muddy back roads to your local track in the 2026 Subaru WRX. Its famous grip and handling is provided by standard Subaru Symmetrical All-Wheel Drive and a responsive track-tuned suspension, while a standard turbocharged SUBARU BOXER <sup>®</sup> engine generates thrilling power. The 2026 Subaru WRX tS and new 2026 WRX Series.Yellow are available for even more finely tuned performance.

The 2026 Subaru WRX is a Consumer Reports Recommended Model.

- Reasons to Love WRX
	You can trace the lineage of the WRX back through 19 rally championships in the U.S.. That legendary performance is based on the time- and race-tested traction of Subaru Symmetrical All-Wheel Drive, delivering reliable grip over all kinds of surfaces and weather conditions. The Honda Civic Si, Volkswagen Golf GTI, Hyundai Elantra...[truncated 1021 chars]... 5-Star Overall Vehicle Score from the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration (NHTSA), and Subaru is rated #1 in safety for six years running, #1 in product quality for five years running, and #1 in loyalty for two years running, according to ACSI.

- Reasons to Love WRX
	With its advanced features, trusted safety, and all-weather performance, the WRX gives you incredible value as a daily driving sports sedans. With a starting price under $34,000, the WRX is also one of the most affordable AWD sports sedans on the market. It’s an investment that will pay you back with years and years of exciting driving, because 96% of Subaru vehicles sold in the last 10 years are still on the road today, more than Honda or Toyota brands.

Also, Subaru is Consumer Reports Best Overall Automotive Brand two years in a row.

Explore Subaru

Our vehicles will inspire drivers like you to become a Subaru owner for life. Find out what makes us more than a car company.

---

About Subaru"

## Small overlap front

The small overlap front evaluation consists of a driver-side and a passenger-side component. If the results of the two evaluations differ, then the combined small overlap rating is equal to the lower rating.

### Driver-side

Tested vehicle: 2021 Kia K5 LXS 4-door  
*Rating applies to 2021-26 models*

The Kia K5 was introduced in the 2021 model year, replacing the Optima nameplate in the Kia lineup. Driver-side small overlap frontal ratings are assigned by the Institute based on a test of a 2021 K5 conducted by Hyundai/Kia.

| Overall driver-side evaluation | G |

response: "{\"session_id\":\"Jh4dxam7S7e4hhH2\",\"results\":[{\"source_id\":\"rHyu_VW51sqeKwOXa9vXE\",\"url\":\"https://automobiles.honda.com/accord-sedan/specs-features-trim-comparison\",\"title\":\"2026 Accord Sedan Features & Specs - Honda\",\"publish_date\":null,\"excerpts\":[\"# 2026 Accord Sedan Features & Specs\\n## 2026 Accord Sedan Features & Specs\\n### You can only compare a maximun of **5** trims.\\n#### Please remove a trim.\\n##### Touring Hybrid\\n###### Maximum trims selected. |\\n| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |\\n| |LX |SE |Sport Hybrid |EX-L Hybrid |Sport-L Hybrid |Touring Hybrid |\\n| |\\n| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |\\n| |Select trims to compare\\n\\n###### Maximum trims selected.\\nEXPAND ALL COLLAPSE ALL\\nPRINT |\\n|#### LX |#### SE |#### Sport Hybrid |#### EX-L Hybrid |#### Sport-L Hybrid |#### Touring Hybrid |\\n|###### Starting at\\n\\n...\\n\\n##### $39,495 *\\n|##### Displacement (cc) |1,498 |1,498 |1,993 |1,993 |1,993 |1,993 |\\n|##### Horse...[truncated 24849 chars]...6,570 MSRP ¹ and offers the same size alloy wheels and standard audio integration as its gasoline-powered counterpart.\\nThe Accord Hybrid EX starts at $30,520 MSRP ¹ and comes with a blind spot information system, wireless Apple CarPlay®/Android Auto™, and wireless phone charging for your compatible device.\\nThe Accord Hybrid EX-L increases the luxury with a leather-trimmed interior and 450-watt premium audio system for a $32,890 starting MSRP ¹ . If you're looking for all the bells and whistles, the Accord Hybrid Touring checks all the boxes from $36,440 MSRP ¹ .\\n\\n...\\n\\n## Frequently Asked Questions\\n### Which costs more: Accord vs. Accord Hybrid?\\nThe base model Accord Sedan is less expensive than the base model Accord Hybrid. The Accord starts at $24,970 MSRP, ¹ while the Accord Hybrid starts at $26,570 MSRP. ¹ The Accord offers five trim models that build upon each other to give drivers a menu of pricing options. The Accord Hybrid is available in four trim styles.\"]}]}"
